title: Process Engineer Vacancy at GAIL India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at GAIL India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
